ddls:
CREATE TABLE "celebrities" (
  "celebrity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each celebrity */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the celebrity */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the celebrity (e.g., Actor, Musician) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the celebrity */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the celebrity (if applicable) */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Place of birth of the celebrity */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the celebrity */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the celebrity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the celebrity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the celebrity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("celebrity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "works" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work */,
  "celebrity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the celebrity associated with the work */,
  "work_title" TEXT /* Title of the work (e.g., movie title, album title) */,
  "work_type" TEXT /* Type of work (e.g., movie, music, book) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the work */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the work (e.g., drama, comedy, action) */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards received by the work */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the work record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the work record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_works_celebrity_id FOREIGN KEY ("celebrity_id") REFERENCES celebrities ("celebrity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, moderator, viewer) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "celebrity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the celebrity associated with the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* JSON data of the celebrity record at the time of version creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_celebrity_id FOREIGN KEY ("celebrity_id") REFERENCES celebrities ("celebrity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "celebrity_tags" (
  "celebrity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the celebrity associated with the tag */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the celebrity (e.g., actor, musician, comedian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("celebrity_id", "tag")
)
